title: Generated Help, Structured Results, Output Channels, and Accessibility
description: Help and dispatch drift apart, handlers print directly, object iteration changes display order, errors use color alone, and progress rewrites one terminal line that assistive technology cannot follow. Learners cumulatively produce accessible deterministic terminal view layer through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Generate overview and command help from registry metadata with usage, examples, defaults, invalid forms, and close instructions.
Return a discriminated command result for data, usage, recoverable error, quit, and aborted outcomes before presentation.
Separate structured data, human status, diagnostics, and exit behavior through injected writers and stable formatting.
